somali.complete_a_challenge_using_fewer_than_: Dhammee caqabad adigoo isticmaalaya blocks ka yar 5
somali.use_random_block_in_a_repeat_loop: Isticmaal block random gudaha wareega ku-celinta
somali.add_a_move_forward_block_and_run_it: Ku dar block «Hore u soco» oo socodsii.
somali.drag_a_move_forward_block_to_your_prog: Jiid block hore u soco barnaamijkaaga oo guji socodsii!
somali.draw_a_square_using_move_and_turn_bloc: Sawir afar gees adigoo isticmaalaya blocks dhaqaaq iyo jeeso.
somali.you_need_4_move_forward_4_turn_right_9: Waxaad u baahan tahay 4× Hore u soco + 4× Midig u jeeso 90°
somali.draw_the_same_square_using_a_repeat_bl: Sawir isla afar geeskaas adigoo isticmaalaya block ku-celin.
somali.use_repeat_4_with_move_forward_and_tur: Isticmaal ku-celin 4× oo hore u soco iyo midig u jeeso 90° gudaha.
somali.repeat_3_move_forward_turn_right_120: Ku celi 3×: Hore u soco, Midig u jeeso 120°
somali.draw_3_lines_each_a_different_color: Sawir 3+ xariiq, mid kasta midab kala duwan.
somali.use_set_color_blocks_between_your_move: Isticmaal blocks deji midabka inta u dhaxaysa blocks-kaaga hore u soco.
somali.repeat_5_move_forward_100_turn_right_1: Ku celi 5×: Hore u soco 100, Midig u jeeso 144°
somali.this_is_tricky_try_increasing_the_dist: Tani way adag tahay! Isku day inaad kordhiso masaafada mar kasta.
somali.draw_a_perfect_regular_hexagon: Sawir lix-gees joogto ah oo qumman.
somali.repeat_6_move_forward_60_turn_right_60: Ku celi 6×: Hore u soco 60, Midig u jeeso 60°
somali.create_any_drawing_with_20_line_segmen: Abuur sawir kasta oo leh 20+ qaybood oo xariiq ah.
somali.combine_everything_you_ve_learned: Isku dar wax kasta oo aad barateen!
somali.draw_a_house_a_square_base_with_a_tria: Sawir guri: saldhig afar-gees ah oo saqaf saddex-gees ah ka sarreeyo.
somali.draw_a_square_then_use_pen_up_to_move_: Sawir afar gees, ka dibna isticmaal qalinka kor u qaad si aad u dhaqaaqdo, ka dibna sawir saddex-gees saqafka. Ka fakar xagasha: afar-gees = 90°, saddex-gees = 120°.
somali.study_this_finished_square_then_click_: Baadh afar-geeskan la dhammeeyay, ka dibna guji socodsii si aad u aragto isagoo la sawirayo.
somali.notice_the_pattern_move_turn_repeated_: Ogow qaabka: dhaqaaq, jeeso, afar jeer la celiyay.
somali.this_loop_should_draw_a_square_but_it_: Wareegan waa inuu sawiraa afar-gees laakiin jeesashada way maqan tahay. Ku dar midig u jeeso 90 gudaha ku-celinta.
somali.add_turn_right_90_after_the_move_forwa: Ku dar midig u jeeso 90 ka dib hore u soco, gudaha block ku-celin.
somali.a_finished_triangle_made_with_a_loop_r: Saddex-gees la dhammeeyay oo lagu sameeyay wareeg. Socodsii, ka dibna akhri sida uu u shaqeeyo.
somali.repeat_three_times_move_forward_then_t: Ku celi saddex jeer: hore u soco, ka dibna jeeso 120.
somali.almost_a_hexagon_add_the_missing_turn_: Ku dhowaad lix-gees. Ku dar jeesashada maqan wareega si aad u xidho.
somali.add_turn_right_60_after_the_move_forwa: Ku dar midig u jeeso 60 ka dib hore u soco, gudaha block ku-celin.
somali.if_on_gem: 💎 Haddii aad dahab dul taagan tahay
somali.check_if_standing_on_a_gem: Hubi haddii aad dahab dul taagan tahay
somali.repeat_until_reaching_the_goal: Ku celi ilaa aad gaarto yoolka
somali.move_the_robot_forward_3_spaces_to_rea: Dhaqaaji robotka 3 meelood hore si aad u gaarto yoolka!
somali.navigate_around_the_corner_to_reach_th: Ku dhex maro geeska si aad u gaarto yoolka.
somali.move_forward_then_turn_then_move_forwa: Hore u soco, ka dibna jeeso, ka dibna mar kale hore u soco.
somali.use_a_repeat_block_to_reach_the_goal_e: Isticmaal block ku-celin si aad si hufan u gaarto yoolka.
somali.use_repeat_4_with_move_forward_inside: Isticmaal «Ku celi 4» oo «Hore u soco» gudaha.
somali.move_through_the_path_and_collect_all_: Mar dariiqa oo ururi dhammaan 3 dahab!
somali.move_to_each_gem_and_use_collect_gem_o: U dhaqaaq dahab kasta oo isticmaal «Ururi dahabka» mid kasta.
somali.use_if_wall_ahead_to_navigate_a_maze_w: Isticmaal «Haddii darbi hore yaal» si aad u dhex marto maze leh leexlex!
somali.combine_while_not_at_goal_with_if_wall: Isku dar «Inta aanad gaarin yoolka» iyo «Haddii darbi hore yaal» → midig u jeeso, haddii kale → hore u soco.
somali.paint_all_the_unpainted_cells_in_the_r: Rinji dhammaan unugyada aan la rinjiyeyn ee safka!
somali.use_repeat_with_move_forward_and_paint: Isticmaal ku-celin oo «Hore u soco» iyo «Rinji unugga».
somali.navigate_the_spiral_maze_using_loops_a: Ku dhex maro maze wareegga adigoo isticmaalaya wareegyo iyo shuruudo!
somali.try_while_not_at_goal_if_wall_turn_rig: Isku day «Inta aanad gaarin yoolka»: haddii darbi → midig u jeeso, haddii kale → hore u soco.
somali.collect_all_gems_and_reach_the_goal_us: Ururi dhammaan dahabka oo gaadh yoolka! Isticmaal wax kasta oo aad barateen.
somali.plan_your_path_carefully_you_may_need_: Si taxadar leh u qorshee dariiqaaga. Waxaa laga yaabaa inaad u baahato wareegyo isku dhex jira!
somali.add_coding_blocks_from_this_toolbox_to: Ku dar blocks coding sanduuqan qalabka si aad u dhisto barnaamijkaaga.
somali.each_block_is_a_command_set_values_wit: Block kasta waa amar. Deji qiyamka adigoo isticmaalaya goobaha tirooyinka. Jiid blocks si aad dib u habayso!
somali.click_run_to_watch_your_program_execut: Guji socodsii si aad u daawato barnaamijkaaga oo tallaabo-tallaabo ku socda canvas.
somali.try_challenges_to_learn_cs_concepts_li: Isku day caqabadaha si aad u barato fikradaha sayniska kombiyuutarka sida wareegyada oo aad u hesho XP! 🏆
somali.switch_to_code_mode_for_javascript_lik: U beddel habka koodka si aad u hesho syntax u eg JavaScript. Wax walba way isku jiraan!
somali.sub_millisecond_imperceptible_to_user_: Ka yar hal millisekan. Lama dareemo isticmaalaha. Ammaan u ah wareegyada gudaha ee cufan.
somali.1_ms_well_within_frame_rate_budget_saf: < 1 millisekan. Si raaxo leh ku jira miisaaniyada heerka frame-ka; ammaan u ah maamulayaasha dhacdada UI.
somali.1ms_1s_will_visibly_lag_ui_needs_progr: 1ms–1s. UI si cad ayuu u gaabin doonaa; wuxuu u baahan yahay bar horumar ama loo wareejiyo dibadda thread-ka weyn.
somali.seconds_to_minutes_batch_job_territory: Ilbiriqsiyo ilaa daqiiqado. Gobolka shaqada batch; isticmaaluhu wuxuu u tagaa inuu qaado kafee.
somali.practically_infinite_at_this_scale_nee: Dhab ahaan aan dhammaad lahayn cabbirkan. Wuxuu u baahan yahay algorithm fiican ama input yar.
somali.set_input_size_loop_depth_data_structu: Deji cabbirka input-ka, qoto wareegga, qaab dhismeedka xogta iyo qaabka recursion. Saadaali sida koodkaagu ugu socon doono dhaqso (ama gaabis) ka hor inta aanad tijaabin. Dhibco maleh, daahfur maleh.
somali.divide_conquer_n_log_n: Kala qaybi oo guuleyso (×n log n)
somali.your_hypothesis_which_change_buys_the_: Mala-awaalkaaga (isbeddelkee ayaa siiya xawaaraha ugu weyn — n yar, wareegyo yar, ama qaab dhismeed xog kala duwan?)
somali.e_g_swapping_array_scan_for_hash_looku: Tusaale ahaan, beddelka baadhista array iyo raadinta hash wuxuu hoos u dhigaa qiimaha wareegga dibadda factor n…
somali.why_does_loop_depth_multiply_rather_th: Maxay qoto wareeggu u dhuftaa tirada hawlgallada halkii uu ku dari lahaa?
somali.when_does_it_matter_that_hash_lookup_i: Goorma ayay muhiim tahay in raadinta hash ay tahay O(1) — marka n=10? n=1,000? n=1,000,000?
somali.exponential_recursion_explodes_after_r: Recursion jibbaaran wuxuu qarxaa ku dhowaad ka dib n kasta. Halkee buu darbiga ku dhacaa si sax ah?
somali.for_very_small_n_sometimes_o_n_beats_o: N aad u yar, mararka qaarkood O(n²) wuxuu ka adkaadaa O(n log n). Maxay?
somali.i_can_explain_why_this_combination_of_: Waan sharaxi karaa sababta isku darka n, qoto, qaab dhismeed xog iyo recursion uu halkan ku dhammaado.
somali.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Widget baadhista — dhibco maleh, daahfur maleh, jawaab fure maleh. Tirada hawlgallada waa qiyaaso waxbarasho iyo sawir-tusmo oo qaata wax-soo-saar wax-ku-ool ah oo ~1 GHz; waxqabadka dhabta ah wuxuu ku xiran yahay cache, saadaalinta laanta, JIT iyo joogtooyada ka horreeya ereyga Big-O.
somali.ai_explains_what_your_code_does: AI wuxuu sharaxaa waxa koodkaagu sameeyo
somali.ai_suggests_what_to_try_next: AI wuxuu soo jeediyaa waxa aad xigta tijaabiso
somali.ai_helps_debug_your_challenge_attempt: AI wuxuu kaa caawiyaa saxidda isku daygaaga caqabadda
somali.turtle_logo_s_drawing_robot_born_1967: Diin — robotka sawirista ee LOGO, wuxuu dhashay 1967
somali.move_forward_turn_pen_down_a_few_primi: Hore u soco, jeeso, qalinka hoos u dhig: amarro yar oo aasaasi ah → fractals, wareegyo, geesle. Buugga Seymour Papert ee Mindstorms (1980) wuxuu muujiyay in carruurtu ay dhisi karaan fikrad xisaabeed iyagoo bara diinka, ee aan ka soo horjeedin.
somali.robot_navigate_the_grid_collect_solve: Robot — ku dhex maro gridiga, ururi, xalli
somali.sequencing_conditionals_loops_function: Isku-xigxiga → shuruudo → wareegyo → functions, oo ku duuban maze aad arki karto. Wuxuu ka turjumaa Karel the Robot (Stanford 1981) iyo halxiraalooyinka casriga ah ee code.org. Khaladaadku waxay noqdaan kuwo meel ah: «darbiga ku dhacay».
somali.drag_commands_into_your_program_use_if: 💡 Jiid amarrada barnaamijkaaga. Isticmaal blocks haddii/inta si aad u marto si caqli leh!
somali.click_commands_from_the_toolbox_to_bui: Guji amarrada sanduuqa qalabka si aad u dhisto barnaamijkaaga!
somali.csta_k_12_iste_ct_sequencing_loops_con: CSTA K-12 • ISTE CT • Isku-xigxiga, wareegyo, shuruudo, algorithms
somali.click_blocks_above_or_load_a_template_: Guji blocks kor ku yaal ama soo rar template si aad u bilowdo
somali.drag_to_reorder: Jiid si aad dib u habayso
somali.forward_50_right_90_backward_30_repeat:
forward(50)
right(90)
backward(30)

repeat(4, function() {
  forward(100)
  right(90)
})
somali.commands_forward_n_backward_n_right_de: Amarro: forward(n) backward(n) right(deg) left(deg) penUp() penDown() setColor("#hex") setWidth(n) circle(r) goto(x,y) home() arc(angle,radius) stamp() playNote(freq,dur). Doorsoomayaal: setVar("name",value) changeVar("name",delta) random("name",min,max) — isticmaal doorsoome $ (sida forward($name)). Wareegyada iyo caqliga waxay isticmaalaan curly braces: repeat(n){ ... }  while (x < 450){ ... }  if (x > 250){ ... } else { ... }. Functions: function myShape(){ ... } ka dibna ku wac myShape(). Shuruuduhu waxay isbarbar dhigaan x, y, angle ama $var iyagoo isticmaalaya > < >= <= == != .
